description_long: This is a compact, armored all-terrain vehicle with a robust, military-inspired design. The body is constructed from riveted metal plates, giving it a rugged and durable appearance, and it features a cylindrical turret on top equipped with a small cannon or machine gun. The vehicle rides on four large, deeply treaded wheels designed for traction on rough or uneven surfaces, with prominent bolts and reinforced hubs. The front and rear are both angular, with armored panels and a hatch or access panel visible on the front. Small details such as rivets, seams, and a matte olive-green paint finish suggest a utilitarian, combat-ready purpose. The overall form is squat and wide, prioritizing stability and protection for urban or off-road environments.
description: A compact, armored all-terrain vehicle with a cylindrical turret and four large, rugged wheels. Its riveted metal body and matte olive-green finish evoke a military design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical turret, large treaded wheels, and riveted metal body panels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the armored hatch, central turret gun, and the wide stance of the wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible turret and wheel details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, rear armored panel, and the robust wheel structure.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a deep, blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with pronounced lugs for enhanced grip on rough or loose surfaces.
